QUESTION: Question
RESTART_INSTALL: Please restart after installation of dependencies
GPU_ACCEL_TIP: This feature usually works, if you experience issues particularly with intel integrated GPUs, switch it off
GPU_ARE_YOU_SURE: Toggle GPU Acceleration setting, are you sure?
WATCHER_ARE_YOU_SURE: Toggle OCR setting, are you sure?
WATCHER_CHANGE_DONE: OCR setting complete. application will exit, please restart
GPU_CHANGE_RESTART: GPU acceleration setting complete. The application will exit, please restart. It is best to restart your PC after changing this setting
RATING_TOO_LOW: You PC LRag rating is very low. LRag will run extremely slowly on your PC and may experience difficultly completing certain tasks

APP.TITLE: LRag
APP.DOCKER_WARNING: LRag requires Docker on your PC. Please start Docker if installed.
APP.DOCKER_DOWNLOAD: Install Docker from this official link
APP.DOCS_EMPTY: Please embed at least one document ...
APP.DOWNLOAD_IMAGE_WARNING: Downloading images may take a very long time depending on your internet speed. Please wait for this to complete.
APP.OLLAMA_NOT_RUNNING: The model process, Ollama is managed externally. Please make sure it is installed and running.
APP.GET_OLLAMA_TIP: You can download and install Ollama from the official repository. On a Mac this is mandatory in order to use LRag
APP.OLLAMA_DOWNLOADING: LRag needs to download the Model Processor Ollama. This will take some time depending on your PC and Internet speed
APP.EXIT_AFTER_ACTIVATION: LRag activated. The application will exit and must be restarted

SLIDE1.PARA2: A 100% local AI solution that runs your PC
SLIDE1.PARA3: *Benefit from complete privacy, chat with your documents directly on your PC*
SLIDE1.PARA5: *No fees for local usage on your PC*
SLIDE1.PARA6: LRag needs to download several components for the first time, please wait for this to complete...
SLIDE1.PARA7: The download may take some time depending on your Internet Connection.
SLIDE1.PARA8: If you have a Mac PC, you will need to download and install Ollama separately. Please click the 'Get Ollama' button above...
SLIDE1.PARA9: Swipe the slide to learn more about LRag...

SLIDE2.PARA2: *General Chat - Choose a model under Models then Chat with that model*
SLIDE2.PARA3: *Analyse a doc - Choose a document under Chat/Embedding e.g A contract, an insurance doc etc... then embed it. You can then Chat about that document*
SLIDE2.PARA4: *Analyse transactions - Choose a csv file under Chat/Embedding e.g A csv dump of your bank statements, then embed it. You can then Chat about those transactions*
SLIDE2.PARA5: The larger model, the more accurate the responses should be. Under Models you may select other models
SLIDE2.PARA6: Consult our forums and support pages for help and tips

SLIDE3.PARA2: Please wait whilst downloading and extracting extras...
SLIDE3.PARA3: You may see buttons to manually install dependencies, please follow the instructions.
SLIDE3.PARA4: The download may take some time depending on your PC and Internet Connection.

HOME.TITLE: Home
HOME.PAUSE_TIP: Pause services to reduce load on your PC
HOME.UNPAUSE_TIP: Resume paused services to be able to use LRag
HOME.RESTART_TIP: Some services have failed a complete services restart is recommended
HOME.RATING_TIP: Your PC rating is based on CPU, Memory, GPU and VRAM. LRag works best with a rating of 60% or higher
HOME.MANAGE_EXTERNALLY_TIP: Optionally, manage the model process (Ollama) externally? This will allow more control over how you use Ollama on your PC
HOME.EXTERNAL_ARE_YOU_SURE: Are you sure? you will have to make sure Ollama is installed and started before running LRag, requires more management. LRag will exit and you will need to restart for this option
HOME.QUESTION: Question
HOME.RESTORE_SETTINGS: Restoring settings and question from this run!
HOME.RESTORE_TIP: You may wish to restore the settings and question for a query you ran in the past. This will restore advanced embedding, insight and model settings
HOME.CLICK_TO_INSTALL: Click below for info on how to install/upgrade dependencies

SETTINGS.TITLE: Upgrade
SETTINGS.LICENSE_EMAIL_MESSAGE: After payment, license key will be emailed

GO_PRO.TITLE: Upgrade To Pro
GO_PRO.LINE1: Access to our support ticketing system run by expert agents
GO_PRO.LINE2: Access to multiple collections, advanced options for embedding, semantic chunking and prompt tuning
GO_PRO.LINE3: Access to specialised, sophisticated, domain specific and cloud models e.g focussing on Law, Finance etc. (coming soon)
GO_PRO.LINE4: Regular model updates and access to multi modal models, images, video etc. (coming later)

GO_PROPLUS.TITLE: Upgrade To Pro Plus (coming later)

DETAIL.TITLE: Models
DETAIL.LOCAL_OR_CLOUD_TIP: LRag downloads models to your PC unless you have selected a cloud model. Requires an Ollama API Key
DETAIL.DOWNLOAD_MSG: Downloading a model uses your internet and may take some time and requires the corresponding local disk space.
DETAIL.DELETE_ARE_YOU_SURE: Are you sure you want to remove this model?
DETAIL.RAG_PROMPT_TIP: Optionally tune the RAG prompt that is responsible for reformulating your question for better processing. Only adjust this if necessary
DETAIL.USER_PROMPT_TIP: Optionally tune the USER prompt that is responsible for processing your question after retrieval of the related document data
DETAIL.REFRESH_LLM_TIP: Download updates for previously downloaded models
DETAIL.EXIT_AFTER_ACTIVATION: Ollama API key set. The application will exit and must be restarted
DETAIL.USE_WATCHER_TIP: Use standard OCR processing for scanned documents. Less accurate then model driven OCR but faster

INGEST.TITLE: Embedding
INGEST.FOLDER_SUBTITLE: Drag and Drop your files below (PDF,XLXS,DOC,CSV)
INGEST.DIR_NOT_SUPPORTED: Directory upload not possible in basic version
INGEST.TOO_MANY_FILES: Maximum number of files reached for this version -
INGEST.MAX_FILES_TEXT: Maximum number of documents for this version of LRag
INGEST.DURATION_WARNING: Embedding may take some minutes depending on the performance of your PC and size of your documents. Please wait until the process completes
INGEST.ERROR: Error during embedding, please try again
INGEST.DELETE_ARE_YOU_SURE: Are you sure you want to remove these documents =>
INGEST.SCANNED_DOCS_TEXT: In order to embed scanned documents they must be converted with an OCR tool. Many are available. Adobe has a free tool, click the button
INGEST.CHUNK_SIZE_TIP: The defined length for individual text segments. Larger chunks: can capture more context but increase the cost of embedding and retrieval, and may dilute specific information. Smaller chunks: are computationally cheaper and more precise but might miss broader context, potentially leading to less comprehensive answers
INGEST.OVERLAP_TIP: The number of tokens or characters shared between the end of one chunk and the beginning of the next. A higher overlap helps retain continuity and relationships between related pieces of information but increases redundancy and computational overhead. A lower overlap is more efficient but increases the risk of missing connections between chunks.
INGEST.SEPARATOR_TIP: When embedding csv files, specify the separator
INGEST.USE_SEMANTIC_TIP: Optionally activate intelligent chunking to improve results. More cpu intensive, can be much slower
INGEST.USE_LOCAL_VECTOR_TIP: Do not use OCR or reranking services for embedding documents. Remain 100% local to your PC for maximum privacy
INGEST.COLLECTIONS_TIP: Group documents into collections for analysis. You cannot mix different document domains in the same collection. This will lead to incorrect insight analysis. For example property related docs in a collection. The fewer docs in a collection the better the analysis
INGEST.COLLECTION_NAME_TIP: Add a new collection by giving it a name
INGEST.COLLECTION_NAME_ERROR: Collection name too short, min 8 chars

INSIGHT.TITLE: Chat
INSIGHT.RESET_CONTEXT_TIP: Improve results by limiting documents. i.e Do not mix document types, e.g. financial and medical. Using a single document is often best. You will have to remove previously embedded documents
INSIGHT.RESET_ARE_YOU_SURE: Resetting the context will flush the model service, reload and rerun the model, this may take a minute
INSIGHT.CONTEXTUAL_PROMPT: Given the chat history and the latest user question which might reference context in the chat history, formulate a standalone question which can be understood without the chat history. Do NOT answer the question, just reformulate it if needed and otherwise return it as is.
INSIGHT.PROMPT: You are an assistant for question-answering tasks. Use the following pieces of retrieved context to answer the question. If you don't know the answer, just say that you don't know. Use a maximum of three sentences and keep the answer concise.
INSIGHT.HISTORY_PROMPT: You are an assistant for question-answering tasks. Use the following chat history as context to answer the question
INSIGHT.QUESTION: Your Question
INSIGHT.RUNNING_TIP: Depending on your PC the processing time for your question will vary
INSIGHT.K_SIZE_TIP: Typically, to answer a question you would want to take the top 4 results from your documents. However in certain cases you may need to change this value e.g during analysis of a large number of transactions
INSIGHT.FILTER_TIP: Models cannot process large volumes of data as part of their context: Use a filter to limit the results for analysis for accuracy
INSIGHT.CONTEXT_SIZE_TIP: Occasionally you may wish to increase the context size in order to accommodate more data input. For example transactional data
INSIGHT.FILTER_REQUIRED: Your use case is CSV with potentially a high transaction volume, you must specify a filter under options
INSIGHT.DOC_CONTEXT_TIP: Add documents as part of the chat, so you can questions about your private documents
INSIGHT.MODEL_MANAGE_TIP: Manage the model used for chat, change model, tune prompts etc...
INSIGHT.MODEL_SETTINGS_TIP: Adjust model settings such as context size, k size, filtering etc...

HELP.TITLE: About
HELP.WHAT_IS_LRAG: LRag (Local Retrieval Augmented Generation) is a 100% local solution that runs on your PC, allowing you to enjoy AI Insights on your private documents. Your personal data or documents never leaves the confines of your PC.
HELP.ACCURACY: LRag uses your prompt and documents' contents as context for the corresponding model. It is limited in accuracy, especially if you are mixing questions and documents across different domains e.g asking about accounts and then immediately asking health questions whilst mixing the documents. The best approach is to embed documents first, ask your questions and then to remove those docs and add your health docs and then ask questions about health. This will allow the model context to reset between domains
HELP.INGEST: You can embed PDF, Word, Excel, Powerpoint and CSV files. Scanned documents as these are not directly supported. These documents can be easily converted with OCR to make them compatible
HELP.DATA_SECURITY: Yes, your data and documents never leave your PC. LRag is a 100% local solution.
HELP.HOW_FAST: Please use a model size depending on your PC power. LRag should answer within seconds. First time start up, downloading initial models, creating services etc... may take some minutes
HELP.GPU_TITLE: Can LRag use my GPU (Graphics Processing Unit)?
HELP.GPU: LRag attempts to accelerate processing using your GPU whenever possible. Intel support is relatively new, if you are having problems starting, switch of GPU acceleration
